mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_follow_stats (user_id, following_count, follower_count) VALUES (#{userId}, 0, 0)
INSERT INTO user_follow_stats (user_id, following_count, follower_count) VALUES (#{userId}, 1, 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE following_count = following_count + 1
INSERT INTO user_follow_stats (user_id, following_count, follower_count) VALUES (#{userId}, 0, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE follower_count = follower_count + 1
